shots.prompt: a commercial real estate underwriting desk late at night with loan documents, a rent roll, a marked-up site plan, and a calculator under disciplined task lighting
shots.use_case: cinematic support footage for a narrated commercial real estate strategy video
shots.scene: high-rise office after hours, distant city lights beyond the glass, quiet tension
shots.subject: annotated underwriting papers, lender checklist, site plan, calculator, empty chair
shots.action: paper corners lift subtly in the conditioned air while city lights shimmer softly in the background
shots.lighting: low-key tungsten practicals, serious, disciplined, restrained
shots.palette: charcoal, muted teal, soft coral, steel blue, warm amber
shots.style: filmic, natural grain, premium commercial real estate mood
shots.timing: single slow push over eight seconds
shots.constraints: no logos, no text, no people, no readable numbers, realistic office geometry
shots.negative: jitter; flicker; warped paper; surreal motion; readable text

shots.prompt: a half-finished commercial development site sitting quiet at cold dawn, with wrapped materials, unfinished concrete, fencing, and idle equipment
shots.use_case: cinematic support footage for the preserve quadrant in a narrated CRE strategy video
shots.scene: cloudy dawn, muddy jobsite, still air before the day begins
shots.subject: unfinished concrete pads, wrapped materials, temporary fencing, silent crane and idle lift
shots.action: light wind moves the plastic wrap while puddles ripple across the ground
shots.camera: slow lateral move, 35mm, smooth and deliberate
shots.palette: concrete gray, muted teal, rust, wet asphalt, pale sky
shots.style: filmic, natural grain, grounded industrial realism
shots.timing: steady twelve-second glide with no abrupt action
shots.constraints: no logos, no text, no people, no unsafe physics
shots.negative: jitter; flicker; hyperactive weather; readable signs; surreal cranes

shots.prompt: a partially built urban high-rise exposed to sudden storm pressure, with dark clouds rolling in over the structure
shots.use_case: cinematic support footage for the expose quadrant in a narrated CRE strategy video
shots.scene: downtown jobsite, late afternoon, storm front approaching fast
shots.subject: exposed steel frame, tower crane, safety mesh, unfinished upper floors
shots.action: wind hits the safety mesh, crane cable sways, clouds race behind the frame
shots.camera: subtle crane rise, 28mm, controlled and tense
shots.lighting: pre-storm instability, sharp contrast, dramatic but realistic
shots.palette: slate, gunmetal, warning amber, bruised blue, muted red
shots.timing: eight-second controlled lift with mounting pressure
shots.constraints: no logos, no text, no people, realistic weather and structure
shots.negative: jitter; impossible crane motion; readable signs; fantasy skyline

shots.prompt: a quiet office overlooking the city at blue hour, with an unopened acquisition binder, keys, and cash reserve materials arranged neatly on a desk
shots.use_case: cinematic support footage for the reserve quadrant in a narrated CRE strategy video
shots.scene: upper-floor office at blue hour, calm skyline outside, no urgency in the room
shots.subject: clean desk, unopened binder, keys, reserve cash box, neatly stacked folders
shots.action: city lights brighten slowly while a soft breeze nudges a page edge
shots.lighting: cool blue-hour ambient light with warm desk practicals, calm and selective
shots.palette: deep teal, charcoal, cool blue, warm amber, brushed brass
shots.style: filmic, natural grain, premium and disciplined
shots.timing: twelve-second calm reveal with no sharp transitions
shots.constraints: no logos, no text, no people, no readable labels
shots.negative: jitter; flicker; readable text; messy desk clutter; surreal skyline

shots.prompt: an older but valuable industrial property at sunrise, with vacant loading docks, weathered concrete, and fresh light hitting the facade as conditions finally turn
shots.use_case: cinematic support footage for the attack quadrant in a narrated CRE strategy video
shots.scene: warehouse district at cold sunrise, thin ground fog, quiet street, opportunity emerging after stress
shots.subject: aging warehouse, loading docks, gate, facade details, empty lot
shots.action: the gate rolls open slightly while sunrise light moves across the building and fog drifts
shots.lighting: pale gold sunrise, cool residual shadows, opportunistic but grounded
shots.palette: steel, pale gold, charcoal, muted teal, rust
shots.style: filmic, natural grain, high-end real estate mood
shots.timing: twelve-second forward move with rising optimism
shots.constraints: no logos, no text, no people, realistic industrial details
shots.negative: jitter; dramatic explosions; readable signs; surreal architecture

shots.prompt: an architectural blueprint desk tableau with a physical building model, a brass key, reserve cash materials, and a strategic site map laid out with fortress-like discipline
shots.use_case: cinematic support footage for the closing thesis in a narrated CRE strategy video
shots.scene: dark strategy room, controlled desk lighting, calm confidence at the end of a long cycle
shots.subject: architectural model, blueprint rolls, brass key, reserve envelope, mapped site plan
shots.action: light slowly travels across the blueprint surface while dust motes drift through the beam
shots.lighting: focused desk light, calm, strategic, resilient
shots.palette: charcoal, muted teal, warm paper, brushed brass, soft coral
shots.style: filmic, natural grain, premium strategy tableau
shots.timing: eight-second precise orbit with quiet motion
shots.constraints: no logos, no text, no people, no readable plan labels
shots.negative: jitter; flicker; readable text; warped models; surreal movement
